name: net_connection_win_powershell_network_connection
raw_query: any where ((process.executable like~ ("*\\powershell.exe", "*\\pwsh.exe")) and network.direction:"true") and (not (((cidrMatch(destination.ip, "127.0.0.0/8") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "10.0.0.0/8") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "169.254.0.0/16") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "172.16.0.0/12") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "192.168.0.0/16") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "::1/128") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "fe80::/10") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "fc00::/7")) and (user.name like~ ("*AUTHORI*", "*AUTORI*"))) or (cidrMatch(destination.ip, "20.184.0.0/13") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "51.103.210.0/23"))))
